summary: Neosapien's brand visibility has increased over the past month due to stronger engagement on LinkedIn and Twitter. Most mentions highlight AI productivity and workflow automation features.
key_insights: LinkedIn engagement increased significantly this week.
Reddit discussions about AI workflow automation are increasing.
Twitter engagement decreased slightly compared to last week.
opportunities: Expand thought leadership posts on LinkedIn.
Engage with Reddit communities discussing AI productivity.
Highlight automation features in upcoming marketing campaigns.
risks: Some negative feedback about onboarding complexity appeared on Reddit.
Competitor mentions increased in AI productivity discussions.
recommended_actions: Increase LinkedIn content focused on AI workflow automation.
Engage with Reddit discussions in productivity communities.
Create marketing campaigns emphasizing automation features.
